# openclaw-medical-skills (reference only)

Not ported into InSynBio/Therasik skills. Upstream lives in the vendor clone:

- `vendor/nature-skills/skills/openclaw-medical-skills/SKILL.md`
- `vendor/nature-skills/skills/openclaw-medical-skills/references/capability-index.md`

Use for biomedical/clinical capability lookup when a task falls outside antibody-engineering core scope.

Update vendor: `python scripts/diff_nature_adopt.py --update-vendor`
